data.title: Add RED structural tests for re-run idempotency to test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
data.description:
Add 3 structural-boundary test functions (patterns verified absent from current SKILL.md via grep → all 0):

test_artifact_detection: greps 'artifact.*detection|detect.*artifact' (0 in current SKILL.md)
test_append_only_merge: greps 'append.only|append-only' (0 in current SKILL.md)
test_idempotency: greps 'idempotent|idempotency' (0 in current SKILL.md)

_snapshot_fail and assert_pass_if_clean are available (assert.sh sourced at line 35).

Insertion: immediately before print_summary, after last existing call. Do not depend on other stories' additions being present.
Header: run 'grep -c "^test_.*().*{" tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh', update to live_count+3. Do not hardcode any count.
.test-index: append 3 standalone RED-marker lines (coexist with coverage-map entries on lines 63/65):
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_artifact_detection]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_append_only_merge]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_idempotency]

testing_mode: UPDATE
Files: tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh, .test-index
